lesson_goal.description: Learner can produce the sign HELLO with correct open-palm handshape and wave movement.

error_patterns.description: Learner curls fingers instead of using a flat open palm.

requirements.name: corrective_intervention
requirements.description: Provide at least one intervention targeting the handshape error.

requirements.name: assessment
requirements.description: Include a quick assessment to verify learner improvement.

lesson_goal.description: Learner can produce THANK-YOU with correct chin-touch start and outward movement arc.

error_patterns.description: Learner moves hand straight forward instead of in an arc.
Movement is rushed; lacks smooth pacing.

requirements.name: scaffolded_sequence
requirements.description: Build a scaffolded tutoring sequence addressing movement.

lesson_goal.description: Learner can produce the sign FAMILY with correct F-handshape, circular movement, and appropriate spatial location.

error_patterns.description: Circular motion is incomplete; learner makes a half-circle only.
Sign is produced too low; should be at chest height.
Fingers are not fully touching thumb in the F-handshape.

requirements.name: prerequisite_review
requirements.description: Review prerequisite signs MOTHER and FATHER before introducing FAMILY.

requirements.name: location_cue
requirements.description: Provide a spatial location cue for chest-height positioning.

requirements.name: movement_support
requirements.description: Provide movement or timing support for circular motion.

requirements.name: revision
requirements.description: Include a revision loop to reinforce corrections.
